name: Quartile Calculator
description: Calculate quartil is of a data set.
seo_description: Use our free quartile calculator to quickly estimate q1, q2 based on values. Not registration needed.

range_hints.values: Comma-separated numbers: -1e9 to 1e9, minimum 4 values recommended

result_context: Quartil is divide data: Q1={q1}, Q2(median)={q2}, Q3={q3}, IQR={iqr}.
formula_display: Q1 = 25th percentile, Q2 = 50th percentile, Q3 = 75th percentile, IQR = Q3 - Q1
steps: Q1 at position (10-1)×0.25+1 = 3.25: interpolate between 18 and 22
Q2 at position 5.5: average of 28 and 35
Q3 at position (10-1)×0.75+1 = 7.75: interpolate between 42 and 48
mistakes: Using different quartile calculation methods inconsistently
Not sorting data before calculating quartiles
desc: Free online quartile calculator. Enter comma-separated values to get instant results.
